feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: How to be liked by your partner’s parent by Clark Kent
entry.summary:
Author: YoursOdi

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,723Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 58

Summary: Clark Kent is absolutely in love with Bruce Wayne and no one could ever possibly stop that love… well maybe except for his father, Thomas Wayne but Clark tries to leave a good first impression when they meet. It shouldn’t be that difficult though because Thomas only really dislikes Superman and no way in hell would Clark Kent be Super- Wait, why are you looking like that Clark? ——————A small little fic about how Thomas Wayne would react to his son being in a relationship with the Man of Steel. It got some elements from Flashpoint but you don’t have to know the lore to understand this fic (I still very recommend to watch/read it).

entry.title: My SuperBat NSFW art Collection/超蝙色色合集
entry.summary:
Author: MMYY_2025

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 411Chapters: 14/14Kudos: 702

Summary: Hi! I’m 咩咩鱼鱼 This is a collection of some of my SuperBat NSFW artworks.Please read the tags carefully before viewing to make sure you’re comfortable with the content. I’m a big fan of trans Bruce / cuntboy Bruce, so in my works Bruce has a vagina and Clark is well endowed.If that’s not your thing, please feel free to skip.   之前画的一些超蝙色色合集，基本都是cuntboy蝙注意避雷，以及我喜欢画阿黑颜高潮脸

entry.title: Flay, Maim, Kill (Especially Clark)
entry.summary:
Author: QianMeihua

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,030Chapters: 8/8Kudos: 571

Summary: The Justice League has too much time on their hands, Bruce internally criticizes. That's the only explanation why they're playing "Fuck, Marry, Kill" for the entire cafeteria to see, right? There's no other reason why he'd be on the list, right? OR Clark is not-so-subtly dropping hints, hoping that The World's Greatest Detective will throw the Kryptonian a bone.

entry.title: Are You Brave Enough to See?
entry.summary:
Author: Gotham_Blight

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,863Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 33

Summary: Bruce has a hard time letting himself accept his role under Kal's thumb. If he only lowered his inhibitions a bit, he'd see that mindless pleasure is exactly what he needs. With a little help from one of Ivy's new pollens, Kal intends to help him see the light. *Can be read standalone*

entry.title: If You Know
entry.summary:
Author: KrooKitsune

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,176Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 36

Summary: Bruce Wayne has made it his life’s mission to make sure that anything he's done as Batman cannot be traced back to him. He's gone to extreme lengths to ensure that no one would ever speak those names in the same sentence. So when the Justice League proposes that they share their secret identities with each other, Bruce can't help but wonder how their opinions of him would change if they knew who he was outside the mask. Most importantly, what would Superman think?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Every Bruce, Every Clark, All At Once
entry.summary:
Author: remember_april_andbeglad

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,710Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 73

Summary: Bruce tried to work out the words, ask for one last moment of clemency. "Does he..." Other-Bruce looked at him with something that almost approached warmth. "...He does. In every single universe, he loves you. Even the ones where he tries to kill you. Even the ones where you're penguins. Especially the penguin ones." - (Inspired by EEAAO) An aftershock of the Rift from Superman (2025) rips through space and temporarily displaces Bruce. What he witnesses in the ensuing journey through alternate--and sometimes absurd--timelines leads him toward the undeniable bond between him and Clark. (Yes, there are hot dogs in this one.)(Clark has passed away in one alternate universe. Rest assured, he remains 100% okay in this story's original universe!)

entry.title: Don't Dream it's Over
entry.summary:
Author: NightTwink73

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,348Chapters: 1/20Kudos: 8

Summary: Eight months after Clark and Lois’s divorce, a breakup letter appears on Commissioner Gordon’s desk—addressed to Batman. But everything about it is wrong. Dear Batman,I can’t do this anymore. Whatever this is between us—it isn’t fair to either of us. You’ve always kept me at a distance, and I told myself I was okay with that, but I’m not.I need something real. Something you were never willing to give me.Don’t try to find me. I’m safe, and I won’t be coming back.I love you. Goodbye.— Superman As Bruce investigates, it quickly becomes clear: maybe the letter isn’t lying about Clark not coming back—and that’s a terrifying thought. Meanwhile, Clark wakes up in a dream life, living beside the man he’s never dared to love… trapped in a prison disguised as perfection.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Am I making you feel Sick
entry.summary:
Author: fanofthegirl

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 75,126Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 482

Summary: Hal Jordan was dying long before a mission went wrong and his heart finally gave out. He was dying when he signed the divorce papers. Dying without making it anyone else’s problem. No one Noticed.Not Bruce. Not Clark. Not the Justice League. And Hal was fine with that because twenty months ago he signed away the right to have anyone worry about him. He would have kept it that way, too If he hadn’t burned himself out saving the world. If he hadn’t collapsed hard enough that everyone finally had to look. Now Bruce and Clark are hovering like they never spent nearly two years avoiding him. Acting like this is their burden to carry, like they didn’t already decide, once, that letting him go was easier than staying. Hal doesn’t understand it. There’s no cure. If Oa hasn’t found one, there’s no point in pretending otherwise. He’s made peace with dying. Bruce and Clark haven’t. They refuse to give up on him the way they gave up on the marriage. And that more than the poison in his blood or the ache in his chest is what hurts the most. Because Hal is still in love with them. And loving them while they fight to save him might be the one thing he can’t survive.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Right Back Where I Started From (Told Myself I'd Overcome)
entry.summary:
Author: Twoodle (NoodleInDanger)

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,331Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 9

Summary: Bruce Wayne is the top prospect expected to go first overall. Until he's not. Clark Kent is a prodigy expected to go second. Until he gets called first. The Metropolis Justice have been a struggling team for years, decades even. Can they turn this losing team around while Wayne struggles with himself and his unwanted feelings for one of his teammates?

entry.title: Fall Back Into Place
entry.summary:
Author: Eternal_Damnation

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,413Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 171

Summary: It had been months since Batman had stopped attending meeting he used to be diligently before time for. Everyone's quiet concern had led Clark to the gritty city across the bay, though he took no ferry. Clark returned with a haunted look of someone who'd witnessed a murder. Close enough to it at least.That same day a message came through from Gotham.Out of commission until further notice.XxX"Watchtower to Titans' tower, the league requires assistance in Gotham, alien invasion, large enough scale but concentrated enough for maintaining a perimeter, spaceship approaching earth’s atmosphere within 7 hours, requesting backup immediately."Every head in the Titans tower common room snapped to attention, "This is the Titans; we will be ready for arrival in..." Kori looked at the other in the room helplessly. All of the core Titans but one... "30 minutes." She finished.Don’t call unless someone’s dead or dying. Or; Dick finds his way home after too long running from his emotions and Batman learns to trust a little. (Edited after reread. And with a bonus chapter now.)

entry.title: Adoption to Adoration
entry.summary:
Author: Missingjay

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,670Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 279

Summary: Bruce Wayne, interstellar bounty hunter, is trapped in a nightmare. Lost in the depths of space, abducted by aliens and held captive as a mindless beast. Powerless to resist the whims of the aliens or reason with them for his release, he is utterly trapped. Kal-el, a freelance journalist specializing in xenobiology correspondence, is in love. A surly little unclassified mammalian at the shelter he volunteers at has stolen his core. He’s never had a pet before and this creature has a history of servere behavioral problems, but he can’t let the poor thing stay at the shelter forever without trying to save it. How hard could exotic pet ownership be.

entry.title: Aphelion
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,282Chapters: 8/13Kudos: 31

Summary: The thing about Lex Luthor's parties is that they are an exercise in applied pressure. Bruce Wayne arrives at a Metropolis gala with a device in his pocket and an exit strategy in his head. He leaves with neither, and a persistent frequency he cannot locate or turn off. Clark Kent is warm, direct, and completely unimpressed by power. He takes Amtrak. He tips well. He eats fermented shark with the serenity of a man at peace with the universe. Bruce builds a file. The threat assessment field remains blank. This is a problem. — A BvS divergence. Close third Bruce POV. Physics metaphors and slow burn throughout. Explicit in the back half.

entry.title: good things come in threes
entry.summary:
Author: elysianprince

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,217Chapters: 2/17Kudos: 39

Summary: "So, what do you say? Just you and me on this one. Like old times?" There was a glimmer of hope in those inhumanly blue eyes of Kent's as he waited for Batman to answer. It was ridiculous to refer to something that was less than a year ago as 'old times,' but Superman had been frustratingly overly-familiar the last few times they had spoken, and it seemed that wasn't something distance had changed. Bruce decided to humor him.Bruce is trying to find the balance between his responsibility for Dick and his partnership with Robin. Clark is trying to navigate catching feelings at the office again, so to speak. Dick just wants to be taken seriously, and maybe for Batman and Superman to stop being so stupid about each other. Somehow, the crime ring trafficking alien creatures in their two cities might just be the answer they've all been looking for.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne
  • Dick Grayson & Bruce Wayne
  • Dick Grayson & Clark Kent
  • Bruce Wayne
  • Dick Grayson
